sentence: When editing visualizations users face difficulty in navigating complex GUIs or are limited by overly tailored interfaces.
DynaVis proposes a hybrid solution: natural language instructions initiate edits, and synthesized widgets enable further exploration with confidence.
Traditional GUIs and pure NLIs both fail to fully support flexible, user-friendly editing of visualizations.
segment_text: Traditional GUIs and pure NLIs both fail to fully support flexible, user-friendly editing of visualizations
